creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
You're burned out doing the x11@ homework, you don't want to join to not have burn out, you have to choose man.
Anyone can send patches, x11@ members aren't the ones supposed to do all the work. Teams are a way to coordinate work done on some areas. It's crazy that you've been a commiter for so long and still don't understand that.

And btw : https://reviews.freebsd.org/D31003
I plan to commit that early next week with some mesa update.
